chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1543 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.8056/2018 2. For hearing of main case 04-10-2023 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General a/w Muhammad Akram Rajput DSP Legal DIGP Office Sukkur SIP Jameel Ahmed, SSP Office Legal Branch Khairpur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG files comments along with appointment order on behalf of respondent No.4 and submits that the petitioner has been appointed as Naib Qasid and therefore this petition has served its purpose and has become infructuous. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. Since this petition has served its purpose and has become infructuous. Accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
